claims.headline: Calms anxiety
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed in CNS literature as a GABA-B-acting tranquilizer with documented anxiolytic effects across clinical and preclinical studies.

claims.headline: Supports restful sleep
claims.notesSentence: Same comprehensive review documents phenibut's sedative and sleep-promoting properties at therapeutic doses.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Phenibut sedative properties review on PubMed
